goal: Expose state graph issue intake, linked patch, source, kind, risk, status, and relation metadata as machine-readable JSON without scraping the human issue report.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Graph issue reports include issue intake, linked harness patches, risk/status metadata, and relation provenance, but CI and release scripts must parse human text to assert improvement issue lineage.
